children.text: issue an order to restrain or prevent a person from violating an order; and
assess a civil penalty of not more than $5,000 for violation of such order.

children.heading: Jurisdiction of district court
children.label: b Jurisdiction of district court
children.text: The district courts of the United States are vested with jurisdiction specifically to enforce, and to prevent and restrain a person from violating, an order or regulation made or issued under this chapter.

children.heading: Civil action to be referred to Attorney General
children.label: c Civil action to be referred to Attorney General
children.text: A civil action authorized to be brought under this section shall be referred to the Attorney General for appropriate action.
